mapper.select: FROM REQUIRE WHERE REQUIRE.STATUS = 'Y' AND USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY CREATE_DATE ASC OFFSET #{pageInfo.offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{pageInfo.size} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM REQUIRE WHERE STATUS = 'Y'
, USER_ID FROM REQUIRE ORDER BY CREATE_DATE ASC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY
, REQUIRE_CONTENT , USER_ID FROM REQUIRE WHERE REQUIRE_NO = #{requireNo}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM REQUIRE WHERE STATUS = 'Y'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM REQUIRE WHERE REQUIRE_NO IN ( SELECT REQUIRE_NO FROM ANSWER GROUP BY REQUIRE_NO )
